productDisplayName: Puma Women Sasha White Casual Shoe
description: Revel in the comfort of synthetic leather and look stylish with ease in this pair of sandals from puma. Pair it with any kind of casual wear and look great. Upper Synthetic leather upper with a diagonal strap across for enhanced style Slip on style for ease of wear Padded inner and removable footbed to accomodate an orthotic Outsole TPR outsole with circular concentric grooves on the forefoot and heel patch for absolute grip and traction Sandal care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
